debug_info.goal:
a b c d s : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c ∧ 0 < d
h₁ : s = a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
⊢ 1 < s ∧ s < 2

failed_attempts:
rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩
  rw [h₁]
  constructor
  · calc 1 = (a + b + c + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by rw [div_self]; positivity
      _ = a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) := by
        rw [add_div, add_div, add_div]
      _ < a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) := by
        gcongr <;> linarith
  · calc a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
      < a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) := by
        gcongr <;> linarith
    _ = 1 + 1 := by
        rw [div_add_div_same, div_self, add_assoc, div_add_div_same, div_self] <;> positivity
    _ = 2 := by norm_num
